query: Cheaha Challenge Gran Fondo gran fondo cycling Jacksonville

videos.title: 2014 Cheaha Challenge Gran Fondo
videos.description:
Recap of the "Toughest Ride in the South" by JSU Interactive.

The Southern Bicycle League (SBL) and the Northeast Alabama Bicycle Association (NEABA) partnered to bring the 2014 Cheaha Challenge Gran Fondo, presented by Wells Fargo Advisors. The 22nd Annual Cheaha Challenge is the largest century bicycle ride in Alabama, with five cycling routes offered - 23, 44, 62, 84, or 104 miles. 

To learn more about the ride, visit http://www.cheahachallenge.com/

To learn more about Jacksonville State University, visit http://www.jsu.edu/

videos.title: 2014 Cheaha Challenge - Whites Gap Climb
videos.description:
Tony Myers, Ride Director for the 2014 Cheaha Challenge Gran Fondo drives up Whites Gap climb. 

"Moving the start of the Cheaha Challenge to Jacksonville State University in Jacksonville also meant moving the start to the other side of a line of ridges dividing the flats of the Chief Ladiga Trail from the flats of HWY 9. Since HWY 9 takes us to the bottom of the Cheaha climb we've got to climb over the ridges to get there from Jacksonville. Not a bad climb, really a warm-up for the longer distance riders and a scenic climb for the shorter distance folk. Since it's a new wrinkle for many riders I thought I'd capture this video so you know what to expect." Enjoy! and turn up the sound!!

videos.title: Cheaha Challenge Century ride
videos.description:
" The toughest ride in the south"
Climbs the highpoint of Alabama twice. 
100 miles and almost 10,000 feet of climbing.
